images.caption: The Chinese People's Congress museum in Shanghai. I love the cute panda pin they gave me!
Hank (organizer of trip) and Diego practicing their photo pose for the coming hike
Shanghai has mostly Western architecture, but this area was like a Chinatown within it
Zhangjiajie
Nice that they are left to be wild, but they are definitely dependent on human feeding.
The monkeys patrolled all areas of this national park!
The girls came as a group, me and Diego both came separately. All of us are friends of Hank.
Getting to try on the traditional Tujia dress. They are the ethnic group local to this area and run quite a few businesses here, including this photoshoot opportunity.
Posing with Hank to share with hackNY groupchat (how we met)
The sign / word for stick also sounds like rich/ money. So people put a lot of these along the hike, as a way to manifest money in the future!
At first: the 99 steps and hole in the mountain were totally obscured by fog...
10 minutes later!
Views from the top lol. This is after climbing 99 steps and then standing in line and then taking 9 escalators. But totally worth it for the bonding experience.
My favorite picture from this trip. Gauri matching the mountain peaks
Bullfrog! This is at a seafood restaurant recommended to us by a cab driver
Chongqing, multi-layered, cyberpunk city
view from hotel room
Best advertising ever??
I saw a lot of women wearing these! Even some employees at different stores. At first I thought it was to protect a recent nose-job. Later learned it's sun protection.
Night hike with Hank and Diego @ Huangge Ancient road.
Night hike with Hank and Diego @ Huangge Ancient road.
Hostel cat. An icon tbh

endScreen.title: Thanks for watching :)
endScreen.body: What is this? I've grown increasingly uneasy sharing my personal info on instagram, but I stil love sharing stories with my friends. I made this as an alternative. Would you use a tool like this? I am considering building it out and need early testers!
